Verified against task description and export_result.sh line 12 which references this path

Task description requires Times New Roman (confirmed via task.json line 5). Liberation Serif is acceptable per CRC Rule 2.105 as it is 'essentially equivalent' to Times New Roman. Verified via California Courts official Rule 2.105 documentation: https://courts.ca.gov/cms/rules/index/two/rule2_105
Task description explicitly states '12 points'. Complies with CRC Rule 2.104 minimum requirement. Verified via California Courts official Rule 2.104 documentation and task description

Task description (line 5) states 'Set the Left Margin to 1.5 inches'. CRC Rule 2.107 requires minimum 1.0 inch, so 1.5" exceeds the rule. Verified via California Courts official Rule 2.107 and task description

Task description (line 5) states 'Top, Bottom, and Right margins at 1.0 inch'. CRC Rule 2.107 requires right margin minimum 0.5 inch, so 1.0" exceeds the rule. Verified via task description and verifier.py line 134-136

pi_items.verified_value: CRC Rule 2.108 exists and covers line spacing and numbering requirements
pi_items.source: Verified via California Courts official documentation: https://courts.ca.gov/cms/rules/index/two/rule2_108. Rule 2.108 requires line numbering with 3+ numbers per inch, and line spacing of double or 1.5 spacing. Task requirements align with this rule

privileged_info_summary: This task uses entirely synthetic data generated by python-docx. The document is a fictional Motion to Compel Discovery (Case No. 23STCV04817, Roberto Martinez v. Pacific Coast Property Management, Inc.) with intentionally incorrect formatting. The task requires reformatting to comply with California Superior Court filing rules CRC Rule 2.108 (line numbering and spacing). Required formatting changes include: (1) Times New Roman or Liberation Serif font at 12pt (complies with CRC Rule 2.105); (2) double line spacing (complies with CRC Rule 2.108); (3) 1.5-inch left margin and 1.0-inch other margins (exceeds CRC Rule 2.107 minimums); (4) continuous line numbering (required by CRC Rule 2.108); (5) page numbers in footer; (6) Heading 1 style for 5 major section headings. The source file is generated at /home/ga/Documents/motion_draft.docx and must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/motion_formatted.docx without overwriting the original.
